title: Ancient DNA reveals the first dogs that became our best friends
description: Ancient DNA confirms the world's oldest known dogs, revealing that humans and dogs formed their remarkable partnership 16,000 years ago.

title: Everything we know about Stonehenge 'rewritten' after discovery near ancient site
description: A team of archaeologists has made a groundbreaking discovery near Stonehenge in Wiltshire that is rewriting everything we know about UK's most famous attraction.

title: 'I travelled back in time to Ancient Egypt from Birmingham'
description: I travelled back in time to Ancient Egypt - here’s how I found the experience!

title: 'I travelled back in time to Ancient Egypt from Birmingham'

title: Ancient bird's long tail feathers were perfect for a mating dance
description: New Guinea's tropical rainforests are home to one of the animal kingdom's most spectacular courtship rituals; but, as a new fossil from China indicates, such behaviour in birds may date back to the age of dinosaurs.
